ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily report */,
  "date_stamp" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country */,
  "cnt_confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "cnt_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "cnt_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "cnt_active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on that day */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on that day */,
  "new_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries reported on that day */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per 100,000 people */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Number of vaccinated individuals per 100,000 people */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country's data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "healthcare_spending" REAL /* Percentage of GDP spent on healthcare */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily report the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily report being validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily report being corrected */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the correction was made */,
  "corrected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the correction */,
  "correction_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the correction */,
  "correction_details" TEXT /* Details of the correction */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* The value before the correction */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The value after the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_corrected_by FOREIGN KEY ("corrected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id")
)
